allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; users=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('users',[]\); [print\(u['id'], u['email']\) for u in users if 'demo' in u.get\('email',''\).lower\(\)]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/zywifoacnzpnuvhjlmzj/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_3e83b9feeee5aebd1cf509e507fb94460481a6a4' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_pending, MIN\(scheduled_date\) as earliest, MAX\(scheduled_date\) as latest FROM public.campaign_deliverables cd JOIN public.campaigns c ON c.id = cd.campaign_id WHERE c.agency_id = '\\''6fac7ab8-4baa-4da2-9447-e3dfeffdbe8c'\\'' AND cd.post_confirmed = false;"}')
